evidence_notes: No-score depends on real persisted mood state; QA cache forcing is not product evidence.
Settings overlay is a transient child state; static main-window capture can miss it.
Natural dialog capture accepted as technical evidence; inspect for complete content, clipping, overlap, and accessible controls.

Filter state depends on real patient status distribution.
Empty patients view depends on real data absence, not only QA in-memory clearing.
Standalone editor capture does not prove Hub-launched chrome or close lifecycle.
